title: Qual arquétipo anime é o seu?

options.label: Filme calmo + cobertor
options.labelEn: Chill movie + blanket

options.label: Competir em algo (jogo, esporte, ranking)
options.labelEn: Competing at something (game, sport, ranked)

options.label: Explorar a cidade sozinho de fone
options.labelEn: Exploring the city alone with headphones

options.label: Rolê com muita gente e foto
options.labelEn: Going out with a crowd and lots of pics

questions.text: No grupo, você é o que?
questions.textEn: In the group, you are the one who…

options.label: Quem consolinha e organiza o clima
options.labelEn: Comforts everyone and keeps the vibe

options.label: Quem puxa desafio e zoa o ranking
options.labelEn: Starts challenges and trash-talks the ranking

options.label: Quem observa e solta a frase certeira
options.labelEn: Watches quietly and drops the perfect line

options.label: Quem vira o centro da conversa
options.labelEn: Becomes the center of the conversation

options.label: Conversa baixo e tenta entender
options.labelEn: Talk it out calmly and try to understand

options.label: Enfrenta de frente, sem enrolação
options.labelEn: Face it head-on, no beating around

options.label: Some um pouco e volta com a solução
options.labelEn: Disappear for a bit and come back with the fix

options.label: Desarme com humor e carinho
options.labelEn: Disarm it with humor and affection

options.label: Empatia e paciência
options.labelEn: Empathy and patience

options.label: Orgulho + treino duro
options.labelEn: Pride + hard training

options.label: Estratégia e timing
options.labelEn: Strategy and timing

options.label: Carisma e presença
options.labelEn: Charisma and presence

options.label: OST suave / lo-fi
options.labelEn: Soft OST / lo-fi

options.label: Abertura de shonen no talo
options.labelEn: Shonen opening at full volume

options.label: Synthwave / electronic dark
options.labelEn: Synthwave / dark electronic

options.label: Idol / pop animado
options.labelEn: Idol / upbeat pop

questions.textEn: How do you make hard decisions?

options.label: Pesa o impacto nas pessoas
options.labelEn: Weigh the impact on people

options.label: Escolhe o caminho que prova seu valor
options.labelEn: Pick the path that proves your worth

options.label: Calcula risco e sai silencioso
options.labelEn: Calculate the risk and move in silence

options.label: Pergunta pro chat / party e decide em grupo
options.labelEn: Ask the chat / party and decide together

questions.text: Frase que mais parece com você:
questions.textEn: The line that sounds most like you:

options.label: “Respira. A gente resolve.”
options.labelEn: “Breathe. We'll figure it out.”

options.label: “Hmph. Não pense que eu me importo.”
options.labelEn: “Hmph. Don't think I care.”

options.label: “…Interessante.”
options.labelEn: “…Interesting.”

options.label: “Bora! Eu puxo o mood.”
options.labelEn: “Let's go! I'll set the mood.”

questions.text: No final do dia, o que te recarrega?
questions.textEn: At the end of the day, what recharges you?

options.label: Conversa profunda com 1 pessoa
options.labelEn: A deep talk with one person

options.label: Superar um recorde / meta
options.labelEn: Beating a record / hitting a goal

options.label: Silêncio + tela fraca / cidade de madrugada
options.labelEn: Silence + dim screen / the city at 3 a.m.

options.label: Atenção, risada, feed engajado
options.labelEn: Attention, laughter, an engaged feed
